flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Atlantic Cape Community College are 21% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($34.2k vs $43.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Atlantic Cape Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.3k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Atlantic Cape Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Atlantic Cape Community College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 (16.2% → 18.9%).
